title: pyrethrum alpinum subsp. tomentosum
intro: Pyrethrum alpinum subsp. tomentosum, also known as the alpine pyrethrum, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is a natural source of pyrethrin, a compound used in insecticides, but it also has medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The alpine pyrethrum has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin issues, due to its health benefits like reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its flowers can be used as a natural remedy in aromatherapy.
